articles.description: History, records, upsets, high-scoring classics - and a thrilling finale. The 2026 Six Nations is likely to go down as the best edition in the tournament's history.
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: France v England finale worthy of greatest ever Six Nations

articles.description: Ever since he pulled on an Arsenal shirt, Max Dowman has been breaking records - and the 16-year-old played a key role in what could prove to be a vital win over Everton.
articles.title: Max Dowman: How Arsenal history maker stole show against Everton

articles.description: The Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Grand Prix weekends are cancelled because of the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.
articles.title: F1 cancels Bahrain & Saudi Arabia Grands Prix because of Iran war impact

articles.description: Saturday evening, when Arsenal earned a dramatic late win over Everton before Man City were held at West Ham, felt as if it could be pivotal in the Premier League title race.
articles.title: Manchester City: Pep Guardiola's unbalanced team clinging to faint title hopes

articles.description: England put in a superb showing against France, only adding to the intrigue around a dismal Six Nations campaign overall
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: England intrigue increases in defeat by France

articles.description: There was an unusual addition to Chelsea's huddle before their game against Newcastle at Stamford Bridge - referee Paul Tierney.
articles.title: Chelsea huddle: Why was referee Paul Tierney in the middle of  Blues' pre-match huddle?

articles.description: BBC Sport Scotland's chief sportswriter Tom English picks through Scotland's failed bid to clinch the Six Nations with defeat in Ireland again.
articles.title: Six Nations: 'Shot at history passes Scotland by amid Irish ferocity'

articles.description: Follow live text commentary, score updates and match stats from Real Madrid vs Elche in the Spanish La Liga
articles.title: Real Madrid vs Elche: Spanish La Liga stats & head-to-head

articles.description: Sweden's Ludvig Aberg serenely plots his way around TPC Sawgrass to extend his lead to three shots heading into Sunday's Players Championship finale.
articles.title: Ludvig Aberg leads Players Championship before final round at Sawgrass

articles.description: Listen to Sportsound and follow live text commentary, score updates and match report from Kilmarnock vs Hearts in the Scottish Premiership.
articles.title: Kilmarnock vs Hearts: Scottish Premiership radio commentary, live text & match report
